title: CW10 0JG, Indaver Solvents Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/BS3859IF/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Indaver Solvents Limited   Installation name: Indaver Solvents   Permit number: EPR/BS3859IF/V006   "
